title: IRGC Concludes Strait of Hormuz Live-Fire Drills
detail: Iran's Revolutionary Guard naval forces completed a second day of live-fire exercises in the Strait of Hormuz, following a NAVAREA warning issued for Feb 1-2. The drills, conducted amid the USS Abraham Lincoln carrier group's presence in the Arabian Sea, demonstrated Iran's ability to disrupt the waterway through which 20% of the world's oil passes. CENTCOM monitored the exercises and described them as 'provocative but within Iranian territorial waters.'

title: Iran Tells IAEA Safeguards 'Legally Untenable'
detail: Iran informed the International Atomic Energy Agency in a letter dated February 2 that normal nuclear safeguards were 'legally untenable and materially impracticable,' citing threats and 'acts of aggression' following the June 2025 strikes. The letter effectively blocked IAEA access to key nuclear facilities including the Isfahan underground tunnel complex where Iran's 60%-enriched uranium stockpile is stored.

title: US Demands Iran Halt Enrichment, Missiles, Proxy Support
detail: The United States reiterated demands that Iran permanently halt uranium enrichment, limit its ballistic missile program, and end all support for the Axis of Resistance as preconditions for talks. Two Iranian officials told Reuters that Tehran views Trump's demand on ballistic missiles as a 'bigger obstacle' than the enrichment demand, signaling deep incompatibility in negotiating positions ahead of planned Oman talks.
